fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one reported sensing-performance measurement.

fields.name: material_name
fields.description: Name of the photonic material or active sensing structure.

fields.name: sensor_architecture
fields.description: Device geometry or sensing platform used in the source.

fields.name: sensing_target
fields.description: Analyte or physical property being detected.

fields.name: measurement_value
fields.description: Numeric value of the reported performance metric.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking to an entry in specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: DOI landing page, article page, or repository URL.

fields.name: raw_file
fields.description: Path to the downloaded raw PDF or source snapshot used for extraction.

fields.name: extraction_confidence
fields.description: Confidence in extracted values: high, medium, low, or unknown.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes for details that are not common enough to deserve separate columns.
fields.example: Operating wavelength 1550 nm; response measured in gas phase at room temperature.
